name: Lemony Chicken with Fresh Coriander
recipeIngredient: 2 1-inch cubes fresh ginger, peeled & coarsely chopped
5 cloves garlic, peeled and finely chopped
3 cups fresh coriander (without roots or lower stems), very finely chopped (about 200g)
1/2 - 1 fresh, hot green chili, very finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wide, heavy pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add chicken parts and cook until browned on all sides. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. In the same pot, add garlic and cook until fragrant.
4. Mix in ginger paste (from step 1) and water.
5. Stir in coriander, chili, cayenne, ground cumin, coriander, turmeric, and salt.
6. Return chicken to the pot with any accumulated juices, then add water and lemon juice.
7. Bring mixture to a boil, cover, and simmer on low heat for 15 minutes.
8. Turn chicken pieces over; continue cooking covered until tender (another 10-15 minutes).
9. If sauce is too thin, remove from heat and reduce until desired consistency is reached.
